recommendations.title: Waterloo Bridge
recommendations.overview: On the eve of World War II, a British officer revisits Waterloo Bridge and recalls the young man he was at the beginning of World War I and the young ballerina he met just before he left for the front.

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Stagecoach
recommendations.overview: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo, and learn something about each other in the process.

recommendations.title: Random Harvest
recommendations.overview: Wandered away from his asylum, an amnesiac World War I veteran falls in love with a music hall star but his amnesia makes it difficult to last.

recommendations.title: The Searchers
recommendations.overview: As a Civil War veteran spends years searching for a young niece captured by Indians, his motivation becomes increasingly questionable.

recommendations.title: Little Caesar
recommendations.overview: A small-time hood shoots his way to the top, but how long can he stay there?

recommendations.title: Gold Diggers of 1933
recommendations.overview: When all Broadway shows are shut down during the Depression, a trio of desperate showgirls scheme to bilk a repugnant high society man of his money to keep their show going.

recommendations.title: I Am a Fugitive from a Chain Gang
recommendations.overview: A World War I veteran’s dreams of becoming a master architect evaporate in the cold light of economic realities. Things get even worse when he’s falsely convicted of a crime and sent to work on a chain gang.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Wrath
recommendations.overview: Tom Joad returns to his home after a jail sentence to find his family kicked out of their farm due to foreclosure. He catches up with them on his Uncle’s farm, and joins them the next day as they head for California and a new life... Hopefully.

recommendations.title: The Quiet Man
recommendations.overview: An American man returns to the village of his birth in Ireland, where he finds love and conflict.
